changeSet.author: xubaolin
changeSet.sql:
-- 更新日程管理，使用前端路由 UPDATE miniapp SET route = '/index/calendar', external_link = NULL, intro = '记录日程、设置提醒、周期计划管理', color = '#F5AF19', icon = 'Calendar', update_time = NOW() WHERE name = '日程管理';
-- 插入排班系统（external_link 用于新窗口打开） INSERT INTO miniapp (name, intro, icon, color, category, tag_type, route, external_link, sort_order, is_delete, create_time, update_time) SELECT '排班系统', '员工排班管理、统计报表、班次定义', 'Clock', '#667EEA', '管理系统', 'primary', NULL, '/#/index/schedule', 7, 0, NOW(), NOW() FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM miniapp WHERE name = '排班系统');

changeSet.author: xubaolin
changeSet.sql: UPDATE miniapp SET route = '/index/schedule', external_link = NULL, intro = '员工排班管理、统计报表、班次定义', update_time = NOW() WHERE name = '排班系统';

changeSet.author: xubaolin
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO miniapp (name, intro, icon, color, category, tag_type, route, external_link, sort_order, is_delete, create_time, update_time) SELECT '日程管理', '记录日程、设置提醒、周期计划管理', 'Calendar', '#F5AF19', '效率工具', 'warning', '/index/calendar', NULL, 6, 0, NOW(), NOW() FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM miniapp WHERE name = '日程管理');

changeSet.author: xubaolin
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO miniapp (name, intro, icon, color, category, tag_type, route, external_link, sort_order, is_delete, create_time, update_time) SELECT '工时记录系统', '工程项目工时登记、补签审批、人工记工、结算与薪资试算', 'Timer', '#E67E22', '工程管理', 'warning', '/index/timesheet', NULL, 8, 0, NOW(), NOW() FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM miniapp WHERE name = '工时记录系统');

changeSet.author: xubaolin
changeSet.sql: UPDATE miniapp SET route = '/index/timesheet', external_link = NULL, intro = '工程项目工时登记、补签审批、人工记工、结算与薪资试算', icon = 'Timer', color = '#E67E22', category = '工程管理', tag_type = 'warning', sort_order = 8, update_time = NOW() WHERE name = '工时记录系统';

changeSet.author: xubaolin
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO miniapp (name, intro, icon, color, category, tag_type, route, external_link, sort_order, is_delete, create_time, update_time) SELECT '八字运势', '根据出生时间生成生辰八字，并结合 DeepSeek 输出流式命理分析', 'DataBoard', '#D97706', 'AI工具', 'warning', '/index/baziFortune', NULL, 2, 0, NOW(), NOW() FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM miniapp WHERE name = '八字运势');
UPDATE miniapp SET intro = '根据出生时间生成生辰八字，并结合 DeepSeek 输出流式命理分析', icon = 'DataBoard', color = '#D97706', category = 'AI工具', tag_type = 'warning', route = '/index/baziFortune', external_link = NULL, sort_order = 2, is_delete = 0, update_time = NOW() WHERE name = '八字运势';
